commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
None. Thou shalt have no longer any lot or inheritance in the land of the people of the Lord. (Challoner)
Strangers had taken possession. (Calmet)
Virgil has the like affecting thoughts. (Ec. i.) Impius hæc tam culta novalia miles habebit? (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Thou shalt have none: Thou shalt have no longer any lot or inheritance in the land of the people of the Lord.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
